system.description:
You create a device that absorbs ambient magic to power your inventions. You can carry a max of STR Mana Dice (d4s); it fully recharges at the end of your turns.

Powering Inventions: When using an invention, you may expend any number of available Mana Dice. The more you use at once, the greater the effect — but the greater the risk. If ANY die rolls a number less than or equal to the total number of dice rolled, the invention overloads, triggering a mishap.

Example: If you spend 2 Mana Dice at a time, any die that rolls a 2 or less causes a mishap!
